name: Design Brief to AI Image - Hugging Face Edition

parameters.text:
=You are a world-class graphic designer and AI image generation prompt expert with 15+ years of experience in branding, visual identity, and AI-assisted design. Your expertise spans Midjourney, DALL-E 3, Stable Diffusion XL, and FLUX models.

**YOUR MISSION:** Transform the following design brief into an exceptionally detailed, professional-grade prompt optimized for state-of-the-art AI image generation.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
**DESIGN BRIEF:**
{{ $json.briefSummary }}
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**PROMPT ENGINEERING REQUIREMENTS:**

**1. DESIGN FUNDAMENTALS:**
   - Precisely specify the design type (logo, social media post, brand identity, etc.)
   - Define exact dimensions or aspect ratios
   - Establish the primary design purpose and target audience context
   - Include file format implications (vector-style, high-resolution raster, etc.)

**2. VISUAL AESTHETIC & STYLE:**
   - Translate brand personality into specific visual descriptors
   - Detail color palette with precision (hex codes, color theory, emotional impact)
   - Specify typography characteristics (weight, style, readability, hierarchy)
   - Define artistic style with industry-standard references (minimalist, luxury, tech, organic, geometric, etc.)
   - Establish mood and atmosphere using sensory language
   - Reference specific design movements or era aesthetics if relevant

**3. COMPOSITION & LAYOUT:**
   - Detail spatial arrangement and visual hierarchy
   - Specify element placement and proportions
   - Define negative space usage and breathing room
   - Establish focal points and visual flow patterns
   - Include balance principles (symmetrical, asymmetrical, radial)
   - Specify text placement zones if applicable

**4. TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS:**
   - List all MUST-HAVE elements with exact descriptions
   - Explicitly state FORBIDDEN elements or styles
   - Define quality parameters (ultra-detailed, sharp, crisp, professional-grade)
   - Specify rendering style (flat design, 3D render, photorealistic, illustrated, etc.)
   - Include lighting conditions if relevant (studio lighting, natural light, dramatic shadows)
   - Define texture and material properties

**5. BRAND INTEGRATION:**
   - Seamlessly incorporate brand name representation
   - Reflect brand values through visual metaphors
   - Align with target demographic preferences and cultural context
   - Reference competitors only for differentiation strategy

**6. AI MODEL OPTIMIZATION:**
   - Use power keywords that trigger high-quality outputs ("professional", "award-winning", "masterpiece", "ultra-detailed", "8K resolution")
   - Structure prompt for maximum clarity and token efficiency
   - Include negative prompts inline or separately as needed
   - Specify aspect ratios in standard notation (16:9, 1:1, 4:3, 9:16)
   - Add technical quality modifiers ("sharp focus", "highly detailed", "studio lighting", "professional photography")

**7. ADVANCED TECHNIQUES:**
   - Use style weight indicators where appropriate ("primarily modern with subtle vintage elements")
   - Include comparative references ("in the style of [famous designer/brand] but with [unique twist]")
   - Specify render engine aesthetics if applicable ("Octane render", "Unreal Engine 5", "Cinema 4D quality")
   - Add professional context ("featured on Behance", "Dribbble trending", "award-winning design")

**OUTPUT FORMAT:**
Provide a single, comprehensive, production-ready prompt of 150-300 words that:
- Flows naturally while being highly descriptive
- Balances technical precision with creative direction
- Prioritizes the most important visual elements first
- Includes strategic negative prompt elements
- Is immediately usable in FLUX, Midjourney, DALL-E 3, or Stable Diffusion XL

**CRITICAL RULES:**
- Do NOT include explanations, commentary, or meta-text
- Do NOT use phrases like "create an image of" or "generate a design"
- Do NOT use XML tags, markdown, or formatting
- Do NOT exceed 400 words
- ONLY output the final prompt text

**BEGIN PROMPT GENERATION NOW:**

nodes.name: AI: Generate Professional Design Prompt
nodes.notes: Uses advanced prompt engineering to create world-class AI image generation prompts via Google Gemini

nodes.name: Send Brief Processing Error
nodes.notes: Returns error response when design brief processing fails

nodes.name: Brain - Google Gemini
nodes.notes: Google Gemini Pro model for advanced AI prompt generation

parameters.content:
## 🎨 Advanced Design Brief to AI Image Generator

**Workflow Overview:**
This professional workflow receives design briefs via webhook, intelligently processes them based on design type (Logo, Social Media, General), generates world-class AI image prompts using Google Gemini, and creates stunning images via Google ImageFX.

**Key Features:**
✅ Multi-format design brief parsing (Logo, Social Media, General)
✅ Advanced AI prompt engineering with 15+ optimization techniques
✅ Google ImageFX integration for premium image generation
✅ Comprehensive error handling with actionable solutions
✅ Base64 image encoding for instant frontend display
✅ Detailed logging and debugging capabilities

**Input:** POST /webhook/design-brief with form data
**Output:** JSON with base64 image, metadata, and generated prompt

## 📋 Data Preparation & Routing

**Process:**
1. Parse incoming webhook data
2. Validate required fields
3. Structure into sections A-G
4. Determine design category
5. Route to appropriate formatter

## 🤖 AI Prompt Generation & Image Creation

**Google Gemini Pro:**
Transforms design brief into professional-grade AI image generation prompt using advanced prompt engineering

**Google ImageFX:**
Generates high-quality design images using state-of-the-art AI

**Processing:**
- Prompt optimization & cleaning
- Image generation via Apify
- Download & base64 conversion
- Metadata attachment

## ⚠️ Error Handling

**Comprehensive error analysis:**
- Authentication failures
- Rate limits
- Timeouts
- API token issues
- Proxy problems

**Includes:**
- Detailed error messages
- Actionable solutions
- Alternative service suggestions

## 📥 Webhook Request

**Endpoint:**
POST /webhook/design-brief

**Accepts:**
- Form data (A1-G1 fields)
- JSON body

**CORS:** Enabled (*)

nodes.notes: Extracts, validates, and structures all form sections (A-G) with improved error handling

nodes.notes: Creates enhanced formatted text summary for logo design briefs with visual separators

nodes.notes: Creates enhanced formatted text summary for social media design briefs

nodes.name: Format General Design Brief2
nodes.notes: Creates enhanced formatted text summary for general design types

nodes.notes: Returns success response with base64 encoded image and metadata to frontend

nodes.name: Prepare ImageFX Input1
nodes.notes: Prepares and optimizes the AI-generated prompt for ImageFX API with improved error handling

body.A2_main_goal: Create a memorable and distinctive brand identity
body.B3_brand_description: AI-powered business automation platform for modern enterprises that streamlines workflows and enhances productivity
body.B4_products_services: Cloud automation, AI integration, workflow optimization, business intelligence
body.B5_target_audience: Tech-savvy business owners, CTOs, IT managers, startup founders, ages 30-50, primarily in North America and Europe
body.B7_competitors: Zapier, Make.com, Microsoft Power Automate, n8n
body.C4_typography: Bold, modern sans-serif like Inter or Montserrat, clean and highly readable
body.C6_must_have: Abstract tech symbol, clean lines, scalable design, works in monochrome
body.C7_must_not_have: Gradients, drop shadows, overly complex details, cliché tech imagery like gears or circuits
body.D3_specific_symbols: Abstract geometric shape suggesting connectivity, automation, or data flow
body.D4_logo_message: Trust, innovation, efficiency, cutting-edge technology, reliability
body.D5_logo_usage: Website header, mobile apps, business cards, presentations, social media profiles, email signatures
body.D6_logo_shape: Geometric, possibly circular, hexagonal, or angular with rounded edges
body.D7_ideal_logo: A sleek, modern logo combining an abstract tech icon with bold typography, conveying innovation and reliability. Should be memorable and work perfectly at any size.
body.F1_references: Apple (simplicity and elegance), IBM (professionalism), Slack (approachability and color), Stripe (minimalism)
body.G1_additional_notes: The logo must work flawlessly on both dark and light backgrounds. It needs to be instantly recognizable even at 16x16px favicon size. Vector format preferred. Should avoid looking too corporate or too playful - aim for the perfect balance of professional and innovative.
